zh.Stanford Rivers, Essex, England: 英國艾可斯坦福 瑞弗斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Tempest Knt.於大約1373年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Richard V Tempest Knt.65歲，母親Isabel Bourne39歲。他和Alianore Washington至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1441年6月8日在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.Stanford Rivers, Essex, England: 英国艾可斯坦福 瑞弗斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Tempest Knt.于大约1373年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Richard V Tempest Knt.65岁，母亲Isabel Bourne39岁。他和Alianore Washington至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1441年6月8日在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Tempest Knt. was born about 1373, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard V Tempest Knt., was 65 and his mother, Isabel Bourne, was 39. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Alianore Washington. He died on 8 June 1441, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Tempest Knt. est né environ 1373, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard V Tempest Knt., avait 65 ans et sa mère, Isabel Bourne, avait 39 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Alianore Washington. Il est décédé le 8 juin 1441, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Tempest Knt. um 1373 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard V Tempest Knt. 65 und seine Mutter Isabel Bourne 39. Er hatte mit Alianore Washington mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juni 1441 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Tempest Knt. è nato il circa 1373 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Richard V Tempest Knt., aveva 65 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Bourne, aveva 39 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Alianore Washington. Morì il 8 giugno 1441, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.Stanford Rivers, Essex, England: イギリスエセックススタンフォード リバーズ
ja.lifeSummary: William Tempest Knt.が約1373年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard V Tempest Knt.は65歳，母Isabel Bourneは39歳であった。彼はAlianore Washingtonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1441年6月8日に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Tempest Knt.(이)가 대략 1373년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard V Tempest Knt.(은)는 65세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Bourne(은)는 39세였다. 그는 Alianore Washington(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1441년 6월 8일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Tempest Knt. nasceu aproximadamente 1373, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard V Tempest Knt., tinha 65 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Bourne, tinha 39 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Alianore Washington. Ele faleceu em 8 de junho de 1441, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Tempest Knt. родился около 1373 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard V Tempest Knt. было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Bourne, 39. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Alianore Washington. Он умер 8 июня 1441 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Tempest Knt. nació aproximadamente 1373, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard V Tempest Knt., tenía 65 años y su mamá, Isabel Bourne, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Alianore Washington. Murió el 8 de junio de 1441, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
